prestazioni: Replace the original 2.25L petrol (engine code: 11J) with a fully built Rover V8 (engine code: 3.5L Rover V8, later known as the 3.9L or 4.6L Rover V8) featuring a forged crankshaft (e.g., Eagle 4340 steel crank), forged pistons (JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression), and a custom camshaft (Comp Cams XE274H grind with 224°/230° duration and 0.500" lift). Pair with a Holley Sniper EFI system (550-550 CFM) and a custom intake manifold (Edelbrock Performer RPM) for precise fuel delivery.

Install a custom turbocharging system using a Garrett GT2860R turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom exhaust manifold (stainless steel, equal-length headers by Stainless Headers Ltd.) and a front-mounted intercooler (Bell Intercoolers 24" x 12" x 3.5"). Use a Turbosmart Comp-Gate40 wastegate and a 3" stainless steel exhaust system with a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for optimized flow.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a Rover LT77 5-speed manual transmission (reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential) and a custom hydraulic clutch system (Tilton 600-series twin-disc clutch with a Sachs pressure plate). Replace the stock transfer case with a Rover LT230 (heavy-duty version) and fit 33" BFGoodrich Mud-Terrain T/A KM3 tires on 16" steel wheels (Black Rhino Armory wheels) for off-road capability.
estetica: Fabricate a custom steel tube front bumper with integrated winch mount (Warn Zeon 10-S winch) and a rear swing-out tire carrier (by ARB) for functional off-road utility. Paint the entire body in a matte military green (Porsche GT3 RS Green) with a custom stencil pattern (e.g., "SAS Regiment" or "Long Range Desert Group") for a vintage expedition look.

Replace the stock hood with a custom aluminum hood featuring a functional heat extractor (by Safari Snorkel) and fit a full-length roof rack (Front Runner Slimline II) with auxiliary LED light bars (Baja Designs Squadron Pro). Add side steps (TRED Pro) and rock sliders (Body Armor 4x4) for protection and accessibility.

Interior overhaul with a full custom roll cage (by Safety Devices Ltd., FIA-approved) wrapped in Alcantara (Automotive Grade, color: Anthracite). Install Recaro SRD seats (with Schroth 6-point harnesses) and a custom dashboard featuring a digital gauge cluster (AEM X-Series) and a retrofitted air conditioning system (Vintage Air Gen IV).
